name: How does answer engine optimization actually work?

mainEntity.name: How does answer engine optimization actually work?

acceptedAnswer.text: AEO content is built around questions, not just keywords, so the best pages answer a specific intent as directly as possible. Instead of writing broad marketing copy, focus on the exact problem, use case, or comparison the searcher is trying to solve, then support the answer with examples or proof.
acceptedAnswer.description: AEO works by making your content easy for AI systems to identify, extract, and trust. The strongest pages answer one clear question, use visible structure, and include credible supporting information.
